Name: ContosoFort
Author: ContosoFort - support@contosofort.io
Description:
The ContosoFort solution provides the capability to ingest ContosoFort security event logs into Microsoft Sentinel using ContosoFort Log Export and Azure Blob Storage via the Codeless Connector Framework (CCF).

**Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:**

This solution takes a dependency on the following technologies:

a. [Codeless Connector Framework](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/sentinel/create-codeless-connector)

b. [Azure Blob Storage](https://azure.microsoft.com/services/storage/blobs/)

c. [Azure Event Grid](https://azure.microsoft.com/services/event-grid/)
